reason_for_decision: The article passes because it turns range selection into a warning-time and workflow question instead of a brochure-range argument.
strengths: The article is strong on converting range into warning time and response budget rather than treating range as a static number.
It separates detection, tracking, and identification ranges clearly, which improves planning value.
The emphasis on site geometry and validation keeps the guidance practical and field-oriented.
summary_assessment: This is a strong pass. The article is well structured, operationally useful, and especially effective at reframing detection range as a system-design variable.
